title: LGBTQ+ Flags
description: Adds LGBTQ+ flag characters to Minecraft's font!
body:
Adds LGBTQ+ flag characters to Minecraft's font!

You can use them by copying and pasting the following characters:

- `¯ÇÇ` (rainbow)
- `¯Çü` (trans)
- `¯Çé` (aro)
- `¯Çâ` (bi)
- `¯Çä` (lesbian)
- `¯Çà` (gay)
- `¯Çå` (demisexual)
- `¯Çç` (demiromantic)
- `¯Çê` (ace)
